# API QA Security Report

-------------------------------------------------
Coverage: Core Endpoints Tested
Tests Generated: 55
Passed: 42
Failed: 13

Potential Bugs & Missing Validation:
- [Unexpected Status 422] GET /model on 'Missing Auth'.
- [Unexpected Status 422] GET /analytics on 'Missing Auth'.
- [Unexpected Success] POST /score succeeded on 'missing_fields' when it should have failed. Potential Missing Validation Detected.
- [Unexpected Success] POST /score succeeded on 'unicode_chars' when it should have failed. Potential Missing Validation Detected.
- [Unexpected Status 422] POST /score on 'Missing Auth'.
- [Unexpected Status 404] POST /feedback on 'Valid Request'.
- [Unexpected Status 422] POST /feedback on 'Missing Auth'.
- [Unexpected Success] POST /auth/send-otp succeeded on 'missing_fields' when it should have failed. Potential Missing Validation Detected.
- [Unexpected Success] POST /auth/send-otp succeeded on 'null_values' when it should have failed. Potential Missing Validation Detected.
- [Unexpected Success] POST /auth/send-otp succeeded on 'negative_values' when it should have failed. Potential Missing Validation Detected.
- [Unexpected Success] POST /auth/send-otp succeeded on 'zero_values' when it should have failed. Potential Missing Validation Detected.
- [Unexpected Success] POST /auth/send-otp succeeded on 'huge_values' when it should have failed. Potential Missing Validation Detected.
- [Unexpected Status 422] POST /auth/register on 'Valid Request'.

Recommended Fixes:
- Ensure Pydantic models strictly validate boundaries (e.g. amount > 0, len(str) < 255).
- Add global exception handlers for malformed JSON to return 400 instead of 500.
-------------------------------------------------

## Generated cURL Commands
```bash
curl -X GET http://localhost:8001/api/v1/health  
curl -X GET http://localhost:8001/api/v1/model -H 'X-API-Key: fs_demo_key_001' 
curl -X GET http://localhost:8001/api/v1/model  
curl -X GET http://localhost:8001/api/v1/analytics -H 'X-API-Key: fs_demo_key_001' 
curl -X GET http://localhost:8001/api/v1/analytics  
curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/api/v1/score -H 'X-API-Key: fs_demo_key_001' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"transaction_id": "TEST_a9dce21c-03c9-439a-a446-6e57990bbdd7", "sender_vpa": "alice@okaxis", "receiver_vpa": "bob@oksbi", "amount": 100.0, "currency": "INR", "transaction_type": "P2P", "device": {"device_id": "TEST_DEV", "os_type": "ANDROID"}, "metadata": {"org_id": "TEST_ORG"}}'
curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/api/v1/score -H 'X-API-Key: fs_demo_key_001' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"transaction_id": "TEST_a9dce21c-03c9-439a-a446-6e57990bbdd7", "sender_vpa": "alice@okaxis", "receiver_vpa": "bob@oksbi", "amount": 100.0, "currency": "INR", "transaction_type": "P2P", "device": {"device_id": "TEST_DEV", "os_type": "ANDROID"}, "metadata": {"org_id": "TEST_ORG"}}'
curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/api/v1/score -H 'X-API-Key: fs_demo_key_001' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' 
curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/api/v1/score -H 'X-API-Key: fs_demo_key_001' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"transaction_id": "' OR 1=1 --", "sender_vpa": "' OR 1=1 --", "receiver_vpa": "' OR 1=1 --", "amount": 100.0, "currency": "' OR 1=1 --", "transaction_type": "' OR 1=1 --", "device": {"device_id": "TEST_DEV", "os_type": "ANDROID"}, "metadata": {"org_id": "TEST_ORG"}}'
```
